name: git-mcp
long_description:
Enables Claude to manage local Git repositories using the official mcp-server-git package. Supports status checks, staging, committing, branching, log, diff and more.

**REQUIREMENTS**
- uv installed and available in PATH as `uv.exe`
- Git installed and available in PATH as `git`
- Windows (win32)

tools.name: git_status
tools.description: Show working tree status of a local git repository

tools.name: git_add
tools.description: Stage files for commit in a local git repository

tools.name: git_commit
tools.description: Commit staged changes to a local git repository

tools.name: git_diff_unstaged
tools.description: Show changes in working directory not yet staged

tools.name: git_diff_staged
tools.description: Show changes that are staged for commit

tools.name: git_diff
tools.description: Show differences between branches or commits

tools.name: git_log
tools.description: Show commit history with optional date filtering

tools.name: git_show
tools.description: Show the contents of a commit

tools.name: git_branch
tools.description: List local, remote or all branches
